title: Mark All As Read Notification Safeguard

posts.author: AntoniaShepherd (Antonia Shepherd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello,

I am looking to see if it is possible to place a safeguard over the ‘Mark all as Read’ as this is very close to where the other little tick boxes are to clear the notification. As they are very close to each other, you can hit this by accident and there is nothing to safeguard/undo or a pop up to say ‘are you sure you would like to clear all notifications?’ I know that you can go into the ones that have been marked as read and place these back as notifications but it is hard to then decipher which ones that you need to have back.

This has happened a couple of times to myself and others in our company which has led to frustration and missing notifications and work.

I hope that this is taken into consideration.

Kind Regards
Antonia

What are you trying to achieve

That the Mark all as Read has a safeguard/undo option.
